inbox.title: Messaging inbox
inbox.description: Start admin-initiated customer conversations, keep public replies separate from internal notes, and monitor assignment, unread, and realtime presence states.

permissionDenied.title: Messaging permission required
permissionDenied.description: This account cannot read private messaging conversations. Use a support, admin, or owner role with messaging read permission.

assignment.unassignedScopeHint: Unassigned is filtered on the current {count}-conversation page because the admin API has no backend unassigned filter yet. Narrow the queue with search or status for exact triage.

list.empty: No messaging conversations match the current filters.
list.endOfQueue: End of the current queue: {count} conversations loaded.
list.nextPageAvailable: More conversations are available after this {count}-conversation page.

detail.empty: Select a conversation from the inbox or start a new one.
detail.conversationDescription: Public messages and admin-only internal notes are rendered as separate message types.
detail.noMessages: No messages are attached to this conversation yet.
detail.publicPreviewEmpty: No public message has been recorded yet.

actions.title: Conversation controls
actions.description: Update assignment and triage metadata without touching billing, VPN provisioning, auth, or entitlement state.
actions.readOnly: This role can inspect messaging conversations but cannot assign or change metadata.
actions.closedReadOnly: Closed conversations are read-only. Reopen the conversation before changing metadata or sending messages.
actions.assignedAdminPlaceholder: Admin UUID or blank for unassigned

create.title: Start conversation
create.description: Private messaging is admin-initiated. Customers can reply after the conversation exists.
create.readOnly: This role cannot create private messaging conversations.
create.subject: Conversation subject
create.assignedAdminPlaceholder: Admin UUID or blank for unassigned
create.initialMessagePlaceholder: Write the first customer-visible message. Do not include secrets, payment card numbers, private keys, or VPN credential URLs.

broadcast.title: Broadcast operations
broadcast.description: Create draft or scheduled in-site notification campaigns from an explicit preview. Tests and UI never execute production fanout.
broadcast.readOnly: This role can inspect messaging but cannot create notification broadcasts.
broadcast.name: Campaign name
broadcast.explicitCustomersPlaceholder: Paste up to 25 customer UUIDs, separated by commas or lines.
broadcast.recipientEstimatePlaceholder: Required for segment or broad audiences
broadcast.bodyPlaceholder: Plain text only. Do not include secrets, payment card numbers, private keys, or VPN credential URLs.
broadcast.broadAudienceWarning: Broad audiences require an explicit admin action. Type {phrase} exactly before creating the campaign.
broadcast.historyEmpty: No broadcast campaign has been created in this admin session.

feedback.nameTooLong: Campaign name must be {count} characters or fewer.
feedback.explicitCustomersRequired: Add at least one explicit customer id.
feedback.explicitCustomersTooMany: Explicit broadcasts are limited to {count} customer ids from the admin UI.
feedback.filterInvalid: Audience filter must be a valid JSON object.
feedback.filterRequired: Customer segment broadcasts require a structured audience filter.
feedback.recipientEstimateRequired: Enter a positive recipient count estimate before preview.
feedback.titleTooLong: Notification title must be {count} characters or fewer.
feedback.bodyTooLong: Notification body must be {count} characters or fewer.
feedback.actionUrlTooLong: Action URL must be {count} characters or fewer.
feedback.scheduledAtInvalid: Scheduled time must be a valid date and time.
feedback.confirmationRequired: Type BROADCAST exactly for broad audiences.
feedback.previewRequired: Preview the current broadcast copy before creating the campaign.

reply.title: Public reply
reply.description: Visible to the customer and may trigger notification workflows.
reply.placeholder: Write a public message. Do not include secrets, payment card numbers, private keys, or VPN credential URLs.

internalNote.title: Internal note
internalNote.description: Admin-only context. This composer never writes to the public message endpoint.
internalNote.placeholder: Record operator-only context, escalation notes, or safe audit breadcrumbs.

readStates.title: Read states
readStates.description: Participant high-water marks returned by the backend for unread diagnostics.
readStates.empty: No read states are attached to this conversation yet.

realtime.title: Realtime presence
realtime.description: SSE delivers event hints only; REST remains the source of truth for message bodies.

feedback.customerRequired: Enter a customer account id before creating a conversation.
feedback.customerTooLong: Customer account id must be {count} characters or fewer.
feedback.subjectRequired: Enter a subject before creating a conversation.
feedback.subjectTooLong: Subject must be {count} characters or fewer.
feedback.messageTooLong: Message must be {count} characters or fewer.
feedback.broadcastCreated: Broadcast campaign {publicId} created for {count} estimated recipients.
